texto: I have seen the sea lashed into fury and tossed into spray, and its grandeur moves the soul of the dullest man; but I remember that it is not the billows, but the calm level of the sea, from which all heights and depths are measured.
autor: President James A. Garfield - courtesy of Millard's "Destiny of the Republic"
explicacao: Citação de President James A.
